Title: All Creatures Great & Small
Actors: Nicholas Ralph, Samuel West, Anna Madeley
Plot: James Herriot, fresh out of Glasgow Veterinary College, pursues his dream to become a vet in the Yorkshire Dales. He discovers that treating the animals is as much about treating their owners, and the Dales' farmers are a tough to...
Awards: Nominated for 1 BAFTA Award2 wins & 16 nominations total
